member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Presentation.HttpRestfulApi.Helpers.ResultExtensions
member.summary: Extensions to support converting Result to an ActionResult. Based on Ardalis.Result.AspNetCore.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Presentation.HttpRestfulApi.Helpers.ResultExtensions.ToActionResult``1(Ardalis.Result.Result{``0},Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ControllerBase)
member.param: The Result to convert to an ActionResult.
The controller this is called from.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Presentation.HttpRestfulApi.Helpers.ResultExtensions.ToActionResult(Ardalis.Result.Result,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ControllerBase)
member.param: The Result to convert to an ActionResult.
The controller this is called from.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Presentation.HttpRestfulApi.Helpers.ResultExtensions.ToActionResult``1(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ControllerBase,Ardalis.Result.Result{``0})
member.param: The controller this is called from.
The Result to convert to an ActionResult.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Presentation.HttpRestfulApi.Helpers.ResultExtensions.ToActionResult(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ControllerBase,Ardalis.Result.Result)
member.param: The controller this is called from.
The Result to convert to an ActionResult.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Presentation.HttpRestfulApi.Helpers.ResultExtensions.ToFileResult(Ardalis.Result.Result{JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Presentation.HttpRestfulApi.Contracts.FileResponse},Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ControllerBase)
member.param: The Result{FileResponse} to convert to an ActionResult.
The controller this is called from.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Presentation.HttpRestfulApi.Helpers.ResultExtensions.ToFileResult(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ControllerBase,Ardalis.Result.Result{JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Presentation.HttpRestfulApi.Contracts.FileResponse})
member.param: The controller this is called from.
The Result{FileResponse} to convert to an ActionResult.

member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Presentation.HttpRestfulApi.InfrastructureEndpointAttribute
member.summary: Marks an endpoint as infrastructure-only (health, metrics, swagger). The ExecutionContextMiddleware performs a full bypass for these — no context is set, no correlation id is propagated.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Presentation.HttpRestfulApi.Middlewares.AnonymousRequestHelper.IsInfrastructureEndpoint(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: True for pure infrastructure paths (swagger, health, metrics). These are either classic middlewares without endpoint metadata or endpoints explicitly marked with InfrastructureEndpointAttribute.
member.returns: True if the request is for an infrastructure endpoint; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Presentation.HttpRestfulApi.Middlewares.ExecutionContextMiddleware.ResolveActor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Returns the actor identity. For authenticated users, extracts the 'oid' claim. For unauthenticated requests (register, webhooks), returns an External actor derived from the client IP — providing traceability without a JWT.

member.name: M:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Presentation.HttpRestfulApi.Middlewares.ExecutionContextMiddleware.ResolveCausationId(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary:
Extracts the causation ID from the x-causation-id header.
The causation ID identifies the specific event or command that directly triggered this request — distinct from the correlation ID which tracks the entire chain. It is null for direct HTTP requests with no prior event.
Typical usage: a reaction handler forwards the ID of the event it is reacting to, allowing the full cause-and-effect graph to be reconstructed from the event store.
Example: UserRegisteredEvent.Id = "aaa..." → POST /send-welcome-email x-causation-id: aaa... (the event that caused this HTTP call) x-correlation-id: bbb... (the same chain correlation).
